def repro():
    # Conditions described in the issue:

    # Attempting to install torch 1.2.0 on linux results in a MemoryError
    # ## To Reproduce

    raise MemoryError('reproduce: see https://github.com/pytorch/pytorch/issues/25164')

if __name__ == '__main__':
    repro()
